question: Does the generated image clearly depict the woman from the first reference image, retaining her facial features, shoulder-length black hair, and white shirt?
Does the generated image clearly depict the man from the second reference image, retaining his facial features, grey curly hair, glasses, and dark suit jacket?
Does the generated image include the Golden Retriever from the third reference image, matching its breed, golden coat color, and physical build?
Is the background recognizable as the specific park scene provided in the fourth reference image (large tree on the left, path on the right)?
Is the woman depicted in a crouching or kneeling pose?
Is the man depicted standing upright, smiling, and looking toward the woman and dog?
Is the woman physically petting the dog, with her hand making clear contact with its fur?
Are the subjects positioned close together as a cohesive group, with the man standing beside the woman and dog rather than isolated?
Are the relative sizes of the man, woman, and dog realistic and proportional to the depth of the park scene?
Do the subjects cast shadows and exhibit lighting consistent with the direction and color temperature of the park background?
Are there any obvious compositing artifacts, such as white halos, jagged edges, or unnatural blurring around the subjects?
Are there any severe anatomical distortions, such as extra limbs, distorted faces, or unnatural body proportions on any of the subjects?
